preconditions: Navigate to the exact URL http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify home_page is loaded in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting each independent test scenario.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can open the Login page from home_page using the person/profile button
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the application is on home_page in guest state.
Verify the person/profile button is visible and enabled.
Click the person/profile button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from home_page guest state to the Login page and the browser URL matches the approved login navigation pattern /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and interactable after navigation from home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Observe the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and available for user interaction on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify password input remains masked during credential entry
steps: Navigate from home_page guest state to the Login page using the person/profile button.
Click inside the Password field.
Type the value Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Observe the displayed characters while typing.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks entered characters during input and does not display the plain text password value.

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication with approved credentials returns the user to authenticated home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home and verify guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to home_page in authenticated state, displays authenticated user identity information, and displays authenticated-only functionality.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and invalid password display only the generic Failed authentication message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter invaliduser into the Username field.
Enter InvalidPass123 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message is shown, and the application remains unauthenticated on the Login page or in an unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify blank username and blank password submission displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Leave the Username field empty.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated without transition to authenticated home_page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with populated username and blank password displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the application remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with blank username and populated password displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Leave the Username field empty.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the application remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify login with valid username and incorrect password does not authenticate the user
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter WrongPassword1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, authenticated-only UI is not shown, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify login with incorrect username and valid password does not authenticate the user
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter wronguser into the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, authenticated identity information is not displayed, and the application remains in unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify leading whitespace in username credential is handled according to implemented application behavior
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter value with leading whitespace into the Username field: space followed by krisadmin.
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
Observe authentication outcome and displayed state.
testCases.expectedResult: The application processes the whitespace-modified username according to implemented behavior and either authenticates successfully or displays only the generic Failed message while preserving an observable authenticated or unauthenticated state transition outcome.

testCases.title: Verify trailing whitespace in password credential is handled according to implemented application behavior
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin into the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 followed by a trailing space into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
Observe authentication outcome and displayed state.
testCases.expectedResult: The application processes the whitespace-modified password according to implemented behavior and either authenticates successfully or displays only the generic Failed message while preserving observable authentication state behavior.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only credentials do not authenticate the user
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Username field.
Enter only whitespace characters into the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, no separate required-field validation appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns the user from Login page to home_page in guest state
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Verify the Back button is visible and enabled.
Click the Back button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to home_page in unauthenticated guest state and authenticated-only UI is not displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns the user from Login page to home_page in guest state
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Verify the Home button is visible and enabled.
Click the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to home_page in unauthenticated guest state and authenticated-only features are not visible.
